SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.classpath.general_idea: Update the Eclipse JRE container path to target Java 11 instead of Java 8.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.classpath.why_exists: The project configuration must align with the target JDK version to ensure correct compilation and runtime behavior; using JavaSE-1.8 on a Java 21 project may cause compatibility warnings or incorrect API resolution.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.settings/org.general_idea: Update the Eclipse JDT compiler target platform setting from Java 8 to Java 11.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.settings/org.why_exists: The project is migrating to a newer JDK; compiling with target 1.8 generates bytecode incompatible with the new runtime environment or intended deployment target.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.settings/org.general_idea: Update the Eclipse JDT compiler compliance level from Java 8 to Java 11.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.settings/org.why_exists: The project is migrating to a newer JDK; compliance 1.8 restricts the use of Java 11 language features required by the codebase.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.settings/org.general_idea: Update the Eclipse JDT compiler source level from Java 8 to Java 11.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/.settings/org.why_exists: The project is migrating to a newer JDK; source 1.8 prevents parsing of Java 11 syntax.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to target the new JDK.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 21; using Java 1.8 settings would result in incompatibility with Java 21 features or runtime errors if the target JDK is 21.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the maven-compiler-plugin source and target to 11 to ensure compatibility with the build environment.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling with outdated source/target levels (or defaults) against a newer JDK or dependencies may cause compilation errors or warnings; explicitly setting 11 ensures baseline compatibility.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/pom.xml.general_idea: Add JVM argument to open java.base/java.time module for reflection access.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/pom.xml.why_exists: Java 9+ modules restrict reflection access to internal APIs like java.time; without this flag, libraries relying on reflection (e.g., Jackson, Gson) may fail at runtime with InaccessibleObjectException.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Change the 'Kontinent' field type from String to the Kontinenti enum to enforce type safety.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.why_exists: Compile error: incompatible types when assigning or passing String where Kontinenti is expected, or vice versa, if the rest of the codebase expects the enum.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Add a default no-argument constructor required for Spring MVC @ModelAttribute binding.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.why_exists: Runtime error: Spring cannot instantiate the model object for form binding if no default constructor exists.

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Update constructors to accept Kontinenti enum and the new image path field.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.why_exists: Compile error: constructors must match the new field types and signatures.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.before: public Lokacija(Long id, String grad, String drzava, String kontinent)
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.after: public Lokacija(Long id, String grad, String drzava, Kontinenti kontinent, String putanjaDoSlike)

SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.general_idea: Update getter and setter for 'Kontinent' to use the Kontinenti enum type.
SlozeniOblikVezbi-Projekat/src/main/java.why_exists: Compile error: return type or parameter type mismatch with the new field type.
